limitations.message: Reference dietary plugin is deterministic and screening-oriented.
Reference dietary plugin does not implement full probabilistic population variability.
Rice does not carry explicit residue bounds; bounded outputs collapse to the point estimate for this commodity.
Default processing factor was applied to Apples.
Default processing factor was applied to Rice.
Use reviewed regional survey packs for regulatory decisions
